query:
-- MATH-2: Geometry (15 questions)
INSERT INTO bridge_academy_practice_questions (topicId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, explanation, difficulty, variationGroup) VALUES
(2, 'What is the area of a rectangle with length 8 and width 5?', 'multiple_choice', '["13", "26", "40", "80"]', '40', 'Area = length × width = 8 × 5 = 40', 'easy', 'topic_2_group_0'),
(2, 'What is the circumference of a circle with radius 3?', 'multiple_choice', '["3π", "6π", "9π", "12π"]', '6π', 'Circumference = 2πr = 2π(3) = 6π', 'medium', 'topic_2_group_0'),
(2, 'What is the volume of a cube with side length 4?', 'multiple_choice', '["16", "32", "48", "64"]', '64', 'Volume = s³ = 4³ = 64', 'easy', 'topic_2_group_1'),
(2, 'In a right triangle, if the legs are 3 and 4, what is the hypotenuse?', 'multiple_choice', '["5", "6", "7", "8"]', '5', 'Using Pythagorean theorem: c² = 3² + 4² = 9 + 16 = 25, so c = 5', 'medium', 'topic_2_group_1'),
(2, 'What is the area of a triangle with base 10 and height 6?', 'multiple_choice', '["30", "60", "16", "20"]', '30', 'Area = (1/2) × base × height = (1/2) × 10 × 6 = 30', 'easy', 'topic_2_group_2'),
(2, 'What is the area of a circle with radius 5?', 'multiple_choice', '["5π", "10π", "25π", "50π"]', '25π', 'Area = πr² = π(5)² = 25π', 'medium', 'topic_2_group_2'),
(2, 'If two angles in a triangle are 45° and 60°, what is the third angle?', 'multiple_choice', '["45°", "60°", "75°", "90°"]', '75°', 'Sum of angles = 180°, so 180° - 45° - 60° = 75°', 'easy', 'topic_2_group_3'),
(2, 'What is the perimeter of a square with side length 7?', 'multiple_choice', '["14", "21", "28", "49"]', '28', 'Perimeter = 4 × side = 4 × 7 = 28', 'easy', 'topic_2_group_3'),
(2, 'What is the volume of a rectangular prism with dimensions 2, 3, and 5?', 'multiple_choice', '["10", "15", "30", "60"]', '30', 'Volume = length × width × height = 2 × 3 × 5 = 30', 'medium', 'topic_2_group_4'),
(2, 'What is the surface area of a cube with side length 3?', 'multiple_choice', '["18", "27", "36", "54"]', '54', 'Surface area = 6s² = 6(3)² = 6(9) = 54', 'hard', 'topic_2_group_4'),
(2, 'What is the diagonal of a square with side length 5?', 'multiple_choice', '["5", "5√2", "10", "25"]', '5√2', 'Using Pythagorean theorem: d² = 5² + 5² = 50, so d = 5√2', 'hard', 'topic_2_group_5'),
(2, 'What is the lateral surface area of a cylinder with radius 2 and height 5?', 'multiple_choice', '["10π", "20π", "40π", "50π"]', '20π', 'Lateral surface area = 2πrh = 2π(2)(5) = 20π', 'hard', 'topic_2_group_5'),
(2, 'What is the area of a trapezoid with parallel sides 4 and 6, and height 3?', 'multiple_choice', '["15", "18", "20", "24"]', '15', 'Area = (1/2)(b₁ + b₂)h = (1/2)(4 + 6)(3) = 15', 'medium', 'topic_2_group_6'),
(2, 'What is the volume of a sphere with radius 3?', 'multiple_choice', '["36π", "27π", "18π", "12π"]', '36π', 'Volume = (4/3)πr³ = (4/3)π(3)³ = 36π', 'hard', 'topic_2_group_6'),
(2, 'What is the circumference of a circle with diameter 10?', 'multiple_choice', '["5π", "10π", "20π", "100π"]', '10π', 'Circumference = πd = π(10) = 10π', 'easy', 'topic_2_group_7');
